name: automation-framework
description: Playwright + Cucumber BDD automation framework for FMT OS and FMT Pro

scripts.test:fmt-os: cucumber-js --config src/config/cucumber.fmt-os.config.cjs; node src/shared/scripts/slack-reporter.js reports/fmt-os-report.json "FMT OS"
scripts.test:fmt-os:smoke: cucumber-js --config src/config/cucumber.fmt-os.config.cjs --profile smoke; node src/shared/scripts/slack-reporter.js reports/fmt-os-smoke-report.json "FMT OS Smoke"
scripts.test:fmt-pro: cucumber-js --config src/config/cucumber.fmt-pro.config.cjs; node src/shared/scripts/slack-reporter.js reports/fmt-pro-report.json "FMT Pro"
scripts.test:fmt-pro:smoke: cucumber-js --config src/config/cucumber.fmt-pro.config.cjs --profile smoke; node src/shared/scripts/slack-reporter.js reports/fmt-pro-smoke-report.json "FMT Pro Smoke"
scripts.test:smoke: cucumber-js --config src/config/cucumber.all.config.cjs --profile smoke; node src/shared/scripts/slack-reporter.js reports/smoke-report.json "Smoke Suite"
scripts.test:regression: cucumber-js --config src/config/cucumber.all.config.cjs; node src/shared/scripts/slack-reporter.js reports/regression-report.json "Full Regression"
